_comment: Score → confidence-rung thresholds per claim type. Score is the signed sum of evidence weights, clamped to [-1, +1]. A claim's confidence = the first rung whose cutoff the score meets. Below the 'unlikely' cutoff falls to 'rejected'. Per-type tuning — different claim subjects can demand different evidence levels.

teleport._comment: Teleports are visible, expensive, and load-bearing — a false positive corrupts hero path data and pollutes battle banners. Demand a real positive evidence to confirm; tolerate ambiguity at 'possible'. The look-ahead pass needs to find post-cast action locality at the destination to confirm.

itemUse._comment: Item uses are common and a wrong one is annoying but rarely cascades — backfill at 'likely' is fine.

slotBinding._comment: Slot.item bindings (Phase B). Easy to confirm from a real purchase or a fresh observation; the startup-grant assumption starts at 'possible' until corroborated.
